positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a majestic mountain range at sunrise, viewed from a calm meadow. The mountains should have strong, geometric silhouettes, rendered in deep indigo and sapphire blue, contrasted sharply against a warm gradient sky of molten gold, peach, and coral. Include stylized flora and small, minimalist animals like leaping deer or soaring birds in silhouette against the bright horizon. The overall style should be neo-folk art illustration, high saturation, vector art quality, clean lines, symmetrical composition, perfect for apparel printing, designed with a circular/central focal point.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, messy, clutter, over-detailed, realistic photo, photorealism
